name: Minced Poultry with Walnuts in Lettuce Cups (Yan)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/4-inch pieces. Place in a bowl and add oyster flavored sauce; stir to coat. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Soak the mushrooms in warm water until softened, about 15 minutes. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup of the soaking liquid. Trim and discard stems. Chop caps.
3. Heat a wok over high heat until hot. Add cooking oil, swirling to coat sides. Add ginger and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 10 seconds.
4. Add chicken and stir-fry for 1 minute. Add carrot, zucchini, and water chestnuts; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
5. Add the reserved mushroom soaking liquid and cook until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Add wine and sesame oil; cook until heated through. Add walnuts and toss to coat.
6. To eat, spread hoisin sauce on a lettuce cup, spoon in some chicken mixture, wrap up in the lettuce cup, and eat out of hand.
Reprinted by permission from Martin Yan's Culinary Journey Through China by Martin Yan, published by KQED Books.
